parameters.query:
INSERT INTO contacts (tenant_id, first_name, last_name, email, type, referral_source, last_interaction)
VALUES (1, '{{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.first_name }}', '{{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.last_name }}', '{{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.email }}', 'lead', 'testimonial_form', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, email) DO UPDATE SET last_interaction = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, first_name, last_name, email, type

INSERT INTO testimonials (tenant_id, contact_id, body, rating, is_published)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Upsert Contact').item.json.id }}, '{{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.message }}', {{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.rating }}, false)
RETURNING id

INSERT INTO interactions (tenant_id, contact_id, direction, channel, subject, body, workflow_id)
VALUES (1, {{ $('Upsert Contact').item.json.id }}, 'inbound', 'form', 'Testimonial Submission', '{{ $('Parse Testimonial Data').item.json.message }}', 'WF2')
